cases.prompt: 결제 실패 회복이랑 dunning 좀 설계해줘. 카드 만료 대응도.

assertions.text: Designs a smart dunning retry schedule.
Focuses on involuntary churn / payment retention recovery.

cases.prompt: Build a cancel flow with a save-offer and a win-back sequence to reduce churn.

assertions.text: Designs a win-back sequence and recovery-rate KPI.
